title: Cacalia × cuneata

intro: Cacalia × cuneata, also known as Cacalia, is a type of perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the family Asteraceae. This plant is valued for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help alleviate symptoms of digestive issues and protect against cell damage.
